Title: Verify user creation process
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page
2. Click on the "Create User" button
3. Enter valid user data (e.g., name, email, password)
4. Click on the "Create User" button
Expected Result: The user is created, and the home page is displayed

Title: Verify user creation failure
Test Data: Invalid user data (e.g., empty fields, incorrect email format)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page
2. Click on the "Create User" button
3. Enter invalid user data
4. Click on the "Create User" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the user creation process is not completed

Title: Verify user creation retry
Test Data: Invalid user data (e.g., incorrect email format)
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page
2. Click on the "Create User" button
3. Enter invalid user data
4. Click on the "Create User" button
5. Repeat steps 3 and 4 with valid user data
Expected Result: The user is created, and the home page is displayed

Title: Verify home page functionality
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page
2. Check if the "Create User" button is displayed
3. Click on the "Create Commission" button
4. Click on the "Create Offer" button
5. Click on the "Profile" link
6. Click on the "Guide" link
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the appropriate pages (Commission creation, Offer creation, Profile, or Guide)

Title: Verify home page access without login
Expected Result: The user is redirected to the login page

Title: Verify menu navigation
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page
2. Click on the menu link
3. Click on the "Profile" link
4. Verify that the profile information is displayed
Expected Result: The user's profile information is displayed

Title: Verify guide access
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the home page
2. Click on the menu link
3. Click on the "Guide" link

Title: Verify commission creation process
Test Steps:

2. Click on the "Create Commission" button
3. Enter valid commission data
4. Click on the "Create Commission" button
Expected Result: The commission is created, and the user is redirected to the home page

Test Steps:

2. Click on the "Create Commission" button
3. Enter invalid commission data (e.g., empty fields)
4. Click on the "Create Commission" button
Expected Result: An error message is displayed, and the commission creation process is not completed

Test Steps:
